text:
Market today: Mood is cautious. That bear market signal flashing (67% historical hit rate) is the real story - it's a direct headwind for high-beta tech and chip names, exactly what you're loaded in. Margin makes this uglier if it triggers.

Your holdings: AVGO at -14.66% is your biggest problem - it's your largest position, already deep in the hole, and one more leg down hits hard on margin. PLTR at -10.88% is flagged SELL - no catalyst in today's news to bail it out. SPAL at -12.1% is a 2x leveraged ETF that decays daily - sitting in a loss on a leveraged product in a shaky tape is a double risk.

Watch: 1) That bear market signal - if broader indexes crack, your margin book gets squeezed fast. 2) AVGO specifically - it's your largest position and already underwater; any sector weakness hits you hardest there.

Bottom line: With margin, a flagged SELL, a bleeding largest position, and a rare bear signal flashing, trimming pain now beats hoping it reverses.
